debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝² : CompleteLattice α
inst✝¹ : DistribLattice α
inst✝ : BoundedOrder α
S : Set α
R : @refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S
⊢ sSup (@decomposition_of_refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S R) = sSup S

          · -- use existence witness to conclude membership in S is irrelevant; this branch never used
            exact le_rfl
          ·
            -- derive (sSup D) ∈ S from carrier_span by choosing a ∈ S with a = sSup D
            classical
            by_contra hmem
            -- if not in S, carrier_span can't be applied; contradiction by using hmem as False
            exact hmem (by
              -- pick any a ∈ S? impossible; but contradiction is immediate
              exfalso
              exact False.elim (by trivial))
      exact this
  · refine sSup_le ?_
    intro a ha
    rcases (R.carrier_span a ha) with ⟨D, hD, rfl⟩
    exact le_csSup_of_le (by
      classical
      refine ⟨⊥, ?_⟩
      simp) (by
      classical
      refine ⟨D, hD.1, rfl⟩)

classical
  apply le_antisymm
  · refine sSup_le ?_
    intro a ha
    rcases ha with ⟨D, hD, haD⟩
    have hD' : sSup D ∈ S := by
      have : ∀ x ∈ D, x ∈ S := by
        intro x hx
        rcases Set.mem_iUnion.mp hD with ⟨s, hs, hsx⟩
        have huniq := R.carrier_span s hs
        rcases huniq with ⟨D₀, hD₀R, hsD₀, huniq⟩
        have hD_eq : D = D₀ := by
          apply (huniq D hD hsD₀).1
        simpa [hD_eq] using hsx
      have : sSup D ∈ S := by
        rcases Set.mem_iUnion.mp hD with ⟨s, hs, hsD⟩
        have huniq := R.carrier_span s hs
        rcases huniq with ⟨D₀, hD₀R, hsD₀, huniq⟩
        have hD_eq : D = D₀ := by
          apply (huniq D hD hsD₀).1
        simpa [hD_eq] using hs
      exact this
    have : a ≤ sSup S := le_trans (le_sSup D haD) (le_sSup S hD')
    exact this
  · refine sSup_le ?_
    intro a ha
    rcases R.carrier_span a ha with ⟨D, hDR, haD, -⟩
    have : sSup D ≤ sSup (decomposition_of_refinement R) := by
      refine sSup_le ?_
      intro x hx
      refine le_sSup (decomposition_of_refinement R) ?_
      exact ⟨D, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨a, ha, hDR⟩, hx⟩
    simpa [haD] using this

classical
  apply le_antisymm
  · refine sSup_le ?_
    intro a ha
    rcases ha with ⟨D, hD, haD⟩
    refine le_trans ?_ (le_sSup_of_le a ?_ le_rfl)
    · exact le_sSup_of_le D (le_sSup_of_le hD (le_rfl)) haD
    · refine (R.carrier_span a ?_).choose_spec.1
      refine le_trans ?_ (le_sSup (show D ⊆ S from ?_))
      · exact le_sSup_of_le D (le_sSup_of_le hD (le_rfl)) haD
      · intro x hx
        have hx' : x ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := by
          exact ⟨D, hD, hx⟩
        exact le_trans (le_sSup _ _ hx') (le_sSup _ _)
  · refine sSup_le ?_
    intro a ha
    rcases (R.carrier_span a ha) with ⟨D, hD, huniq⟩
    have hDmem : D ∈ R := hD.1
    have haSup : a = sSup D := hD.2
    subst haSup
    refine le_trans (le_sSup (show D ⊆ decomposition_of_refinement R from ?_)) (le_rfl)
    intro x hx
    exact ⟨D, hDmem, hx⟩

apply le_antisymm
  · refine sSup_le ?_
    intro a ha
    rcases (by
      simpa [decomposition_of_refinement] using ha : ∃ D, ∃ _ : D ∈ R, a ∈ D) with ⟨D, hDR, haD⟩
    rcases (R.bot_not_mem D hDR) with hbot
    have hDne : D.Nonempty := ⟨a, haD⟩
    have hsDle : sSup D ≤ sSup S := by
      rcases (hDne.csSup_mem (s := D) (hbot := hbot)) with ⟨x, hxD, hxle⟩
      rcases (R.carrier_span x (by
        have : x = sSup D := le_antisymm (by
          refine le_csSup ?_ hxD
          exact ⟨a, haD⟩) (csSup_le (by
          intro y hy
          exact le_csSup (by
            exact ⟨x, hxD, hxle⟩) ?_ ) )? ) with
        | _ => ?_
      ·
        have hxS : x ∈ S := by
          have : x ∈ S := by
            classical
            by_contra hxS
            exact False.elim (by
              have := R.carrier_span x (by contradiction)
              contradiction)
          exact this
        exact le_trans (le_csSup (by exact ⟨x, hxS⟩) hxle) le_rfl
    exact le_trans (le_csSup (by
      refine ⟨a, haD, le_rfl⟩) (le_rfl)) hsDle
  · refine sSup_le ?_
    intro a ha
    rcases R.carrier_span a ha with ⟨D, hDR, rfl, huniq⟩
    exact le_csSup (by
      refine ⟨D, hDR, ?_⟩
      exact by
        rcases (R.bot_not_mem D hDR) with hbot
        have : (⊥ : α) ≤ sSup D := bot_le
        exact this) (le_rfl)
